subcodes.title: Words to a friend, spoken on 1913-05-08
subcodes.first_line: God has created in you a great capacity. You must expend this capacity in the Cause of the Kingdom. If you consecrate it to any other cause except the promotion of the virtues of the world of humanity, its results will be finite.
subcodes.first_line_orig: خدا استعدادی را که بشما عنایت فرموده برای اینست که در خدمت ملکوتش صرف نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @Mary Magdalene, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
